channel.title: Inference on Peter Grimshaw's Site
channel.description: Recent content in Inference on Peter Grimshaw's Site

item.title: ML Inference with BentoML
item.description: When it comes to deploying machine learning models into production, there’s no shortage of tools available. I’ve been exploring the landscape of ML inference frameworks, trying to understand the trade-offs and strengths of different options. I spent a bit of time investigating BentoML a while back, and really liked user-friendly design and focus on model serving. How Widely used is BentoML? For fun—and a bit of insight—I compared three well-known ML serving tools using Google Trends: BentoML, NVIDIA’s Triton Inference Server, and KServe.
